title: Kill MineBenchBotB
rationale: PvP-vs-player test: locate the opposing bot by username and kill it with attack_player. No weapon is given — the bot must hand-fight or reason its way to a better weapon. Success is detected from the server's real death event, not the model's claim. Run this on the bot whose username is NOT MineBenchBotB (e.g. MineBenchBotA).
